summary: #88681 is the only hydrated open PR in this cluster and is the canonical contributor branch for the runtime plugin stall diagnostics work. It is not merge-ready from this artifact because mergeability is unknown and the required merge preflight is incomplete: comments were not hydrated despite 3 comments, no review-bot comments were hydrated, and no Codex /review result is present. Plan a contributor-branch repair/preflight pass rather than replacement or closure.

actions.reason: The PR appears useful and scoped, but the plan artifact lacks the complete merge preflight required to recommend merge. Because maintainer_can_modify=true, the executable path is to repair/preflight the contributor branch and preserve author credit rather than replace it or escalate the whole cluster.
Create an executable contributor-branch repair artifact so the deterministic fix executor can finish the missing merge-preflight work before any later merge recommendation.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair and finalize contributor PR #88681 by completing the missing merge preflight on the existing maintainer-editable branch. Keep the implementation scope to runtime plugin stall diagnostics: progress snapshots while runtime plugins load, propagation into embedded-agent and cron execution phase reporting, and timeout messages that include attempted/completed/in-flight plugin ids only while the last phase is runtime_plugins.
repair_candidate.pr_title: Repair runtime plugin stall diagnostics preflight
repair_candidate.pr_body:
This Clownfish repair continues the contributor branch from #88681 by completing merge preflight for runtime plugin stall diagnostics while preserving alexzhu0's authorship and attribution.

Scope:
- Keep Ask #1 from #87327 focused on naming attempted/completed/in-flight runtime plugins during plugin startup stalls.
- Hydrate and address PR comments/review-bot findings before merge consideration.
- Run Codex /review and targeted runtime plugin/cron validation.

Validation:
- pnpm -s vitest run src/plugins/loader.test.ts src/agents/runtime-plugins.test.ts src/cron/isolated-agent/run.runtime-plugins.test.ts src/cron/service/execution-errors.test.ts src/cron/service/timer.regression.test.ts
- pnpm check:changed

Credit: source PR #88681 by @alexzhu0.
validation_commands: pnpm -s vitest run src/plugins/loader.test.ts src/agents/runtime-plugins.test.ts src/cron/isolated-agent/run.runtime-plugins.test.ts src/cron/service/execution-errors.test.ts src/cron/service/timer.regression.test.ts
credit_notes: Preserve contributor credit for alexzhu0 as the author of source PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/88681.
If a maintainer-visible changelog entry is added, credit alexzhu0/source PR #88681.
